execution_history.reason: Portfolio modifications aligned with tool analytics—removals, additions, and trims have robust risk/return and sector/correlation rationale.
Portfolio modifications aligned with tool analytics—removals, additions, and trims have robust risk/return and sector/correlation rationale.

observations: Removed DGNX for extreme volatility, drawdown, speculative fundamentals. Added KLAC for high-quality, compounding semicap exposure with strong process-control, ROE, and momentum. Trimmed CRDO, OKLO, and MTSI to minimal tactical weights due to high-variance. Increased BSX and SGDM/VCSH for further risk-adjusted return, boosted WEC as low-beta/defensive anchor. ARM downsized for valuation/sentiment risk and high beta. No position >7.5%, all sector caps <20%, minimum position size >0.005.

execution_history.reason: All position-level theses are consolidated from factor, performance, macro/fundamental, and scenario tool outputs, using latest sector, correlation, and risk data.
All position-level theses are consolidated from factor, performance, macro/fundamental, and scenario tool outputs, using latest sector, correlation, and risk data.

observations: Thesis for each holding assembled from tool analytics: APP: Exceptional profitability expansion, S&P 500 inclusion, strong risk-adjusted return and momentum. AVGO: Leading AI/ASIC chip exposure with strong FCF, margin, and multi-year tailwinds. BSX: Consistent, low-volatility medtech performer with 2x Sharpe vs sector. CEG: Best-in-class turnaround in clean/renewable energy, sector-beating growth and margin expansion. CMS: Regulated utility with sector-leading margins, disciplined capex, and strong liquidity trends. CRDO: Niche, high-growth data/connectivity play, trimmed for risk, but retains operational improvement. EIS: Outperforming ETF with macro, demographic, and currency tailwinds. EQIX: Secular growth data center REIT with reliable earnings and thematic, defensive AI exposure. EXOD: Tactical, high-momentum software growth allocation, risk-limited. FITB: Profitable regional bank with recent balance sheet/FCF discipline. FR: Diversified industrial REIT, robust margin and U.S. logistics trend tailwinds. FUFU: Speculative, recovery-focused software for asymmetric upside, weight capped for risk. GREK: High-momentum Greece ETF with financial sector differentiation.
